section.heading: Submission of plans to State and local officials

subsection.heading: Submission to governing body of Indian reservation or Alaska Native village

content.p: No financial assistance may be provided to any project under section 2991b of this title or any research, demonstration, or pilot project under section 2991d of this title, which is to be carried out on or in an Indian reservation or Alaska Native village, unless a plan setting forth the project has been submitted to the governing body of that reservation or village and the plan has not been disapproved by the governing body within thirty days of its submission.

subsection.heading: Notification to chief executive officer of State or Territory

content.p: No financial assistance may be provided to any project under section 2991b of this title or any research, demonstration, or pilot project under section 2991d of this title, which is to be carried out in a State or Territory other than on or in an Indian reservation or Alaska Native village or Hawaiian Homestead, unless the Commissioner has notified the chief executive officer of the State or Territory of the decision of the Commissioner to provide that assistance.

subsection.heading: Notification to local governing officials of political subdivision

content.p: No financial assistance may be provided to any project under section 2991b of this title or any research, demonstration, or pilot project under section 2991d of this title, which is to be carried out in a city, county, or other major political subdivision of a State or Territory, other than on or in an Indian reservation or Alaska Native village, or Hawaiian Homestead, unless the Commissioner has notified the local governing officials of the political subdivision of the decision of the Commissioner to provide that assistance.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: A prior section 808 of Pub. L. 88–452 was renumbered section 809 and is classified to section 2991g of this title.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1992—Pub. L. 102–375 substituted “Alaska Native village” for “Alaskan Native village” and “Commissioner” for “Secretary” wherever appearing.
1987—Subsecs. (b), (c). Pub. L. 100–175, § 504(b)(3), inserted “or territory” after “State” wherever appearing.
1978—Subsecs. (b), (c). Pub. L. 95–568 substituted “the decision of the Secretary” for “his decision”.

note.heading: Effective Date of 1987 Amendment
note.p: Amendment by Pub. L. 100–175 effective Oct. 1, 1987, see section 701(a) of Pub. L. 100–175, set out as a note under section 3001 of this title.
